headline: BofA revisits Costco stock price target after= sales surprise
summary: I have a theory about Costco. When the economy gets confusing, when tariffs are rising, inflation is creeping back, and nobody is quite sure what happens next, people don't stop spending. They just get smarter about where they spend. Costco (COST) is where smart spending goes. That theory got fresh ...

headline: T-Mobile lifts a frustrating perk restriction for Costco members
summary: T-Mobile has been doubling down on boosting customer loyalty after several months of continued customer losses in its wireless business. As the company works to keep customers from flocking to its competitors, it is sweetening the deal for Costco members by removing a rule that restricted ...

headline: Costco Stock Is Benefiting from a Jump in April Sales. It Can Thank the Strait of Hormuz.
summary: Costco rode Strait of Hormuz jitters straight into overflowing carts, turning anxious shoppers into April’s biggest sales engine.

headline: Nike Faces Class Action Over Tariff Refunds
summary: Nike is the latest brand to come under fire from consumers seeking payback for the tariffs they say they paid in the form of higher prices at retail.

headline: Costco Posts Strong April Sales Growth, Digital Sales Rise Nearly 19%
summary: With a YTD Return of 17.35% as of May 7, Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy to Beat the S&P 500. On May 6, Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) reported net sales of $23.92 billion for the four-week retail month ended May 3, 2026. That was up 13.0% from $21.18 billion […]
